meta.title: JIA LUCK SA — Complete AED-GPS Rent & Buy Solutions
meta.description: Complete AED solutions with GPS tracking. Choose to own (Safety Premium), rent-to-own (Safety Start), or full-service rental (Safety Care) — including cabinet, training and after-sales service. By JIA LUCK SA (jia1669).

hero.title: Complete AED-GPS, Rent or Buy
hero.subtitle: Choose the AED safety package that fits your business — buy outright, rent-to-own, or full-service rental, each with a built-in GPS system.

valueProps.title: Why AED paired with GPS
valueProps.subtitle: Not just a life-saving device, but a more complete safety and asset-management system.

items.title: Every second is a life
items.desc: Sudden cardiac arrest can strike anywhere, anytime, and survival odds drop every minute. A ready AED plus training significantly increases the chance of survival.

items.title: GPS for all-round safety management
items.desc: Beyond tracking the device itself, GPS tracks company ambulances, emergency vehicles, off-site teams and company assets — so help arrives faster in a crisis.

items.title: Pick by budget and flexibility
items.desc: Buy outright to own immediately, pay monthly to own, or rent full-service with no equipment upkeep — and upgrade or change packages later.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Questions about products, pricing, installation and contract terms.

items.a: Every package includes a complete safety set: 1) an AED, 2) a GPS tracking system, and 3) a standard storage cabinet, plus usage training and after-sales service per package. With Safety Premium and Safety Start you own the equipment; Safety Care is a full-service rental.

items.q: Why pair GPS with the AED?
items.a: GPS isn't only for tracking the device — it's a more complete safety-management system. It tracks company ambulances, emergency vehicles and off-site teams so help arrives faster in a crisis, and it can track company assets too.

items.q: Is training required to use an AED?
items.a: We strongly recommend it. Even though modern AEDs are easy to use with voice prompts, training builds confidence, reduces panic, and teaches essential basic CPR alongside device use — significantly improving survival odds. That's why training is included in every package.

items.q: How is Safety Start (rent-to-own) different from regular rental?
items.a: With regular rental you keep paying and the equipment stays ours. Safety Start is installment payment toward ownership — after completing the 18-month contract the equipment becomes your organization's asset at no extra cost, spreading the investment while still ending in ownership.

items.q: Are there hidden fees or extra maintenance costs?
items.a: The advertised price is the final price including basic service. Safety Premium & Start include initial inspection and manufacturer warranty, though batteries or electrode pads are standard consumables that may need replacing in later years. Safety Care includes everything — maintenance, consumables and software updates — with no extra cost during the contract.

items.q: Do you offer financing through banks?
items.a: Yes. For Safety Premium (buy outright) we can coordinate with partner financial institutions for installment plans. Contact our sales team for details and suitable interest rates.

items.q: How soon can we start using the service?
items.a: Quickly. After agreement and payment, delivery and basic training can be scheduled within 3–5 business days. Complex cabinet or system installations may be assessed case by case.

items.q: How do I get service if the equipment has a problem?
items.a: We offer after-sales service through several channels: phone support for basic issues, on-site service for problems requiring a technician, and backup device replacement under Safety Care for urgent cases. Warranty details are clearly stated in the contract.

items.q: Can I trial or test a device before deciding?
items.a: Yes. We offer product demonstration and trials at our office, or scheduled at your site, so you can see the quality and fit before deciding.

items.q: What happens if I cancel mid-contract (Safety Start and Care)?
items.a: Safety Start (rent-to-own): if cancelled mid-contract the deposit is treated as a penalty and is non-refundable, and the equipment must be returned in good condition. Safety Care (rental): you can cancel at the end of the annual contract, and the deposit is refunded after the equipment is returned complete and in good condition.

items.q: What warranties or guarantees are there?
items.a: Every new AED comes with a manufacturer warranty (typically 5–8 years). Our service provides a satisfaction guarantee on installation and training, and some packages include coverage for damage from natural disasters or theft (see the contract for details).

items.q: Can I change packages in the future?
items.a: Absolutely. For example, upgrade from Safety Care to Safety Start when you want ownership, or add more AED and GPS units to your existing package. Contact our sales team for a new quote anytime.
